Since the patient is explicitly diagnosed with a form of lipid disorder (Pure hypercholesterolemia) in the current visit, there is strong and explicit evidence that this diagnosis will be coded in the next hospital visit, fulfilling the criteria for answering "Yes". The presence of this explicit diagnosis overrides the need to rely on general risk factors (like diabetes or hypertension) or medication use alone.
